title: Proxy transmission with meta attribute
abstract: An embodiment includes a station (STA) in a wireless network, the STA comprising memory and a processor coupled to the memory, the processor configured to receive, from an origin STA, a first discovery frame that includes one or more attributes intended for proxied transmission, generate a second discovery frame that includes the one or more attributes intended for proxied transmission based on the first discovery frame and appends additional information, wherein the additional information includes an indication that the one or more attributes are associated with the origin STA and that the one or more attributes are being transmitted by proxy transmission, and wherein the additional information includes address information for the origin STA, and transmit, to one or more other STAs, the second discovery frame.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A station (STA) in a wireless network, the STA comprising: memory; and a processor coupled to the memory, the processor configured to: receive, from an origin STA, a first discovery frame that includes one or more attributes intended for proxied transmission; generate a second discovery frame that includes the one or more attributes intended for proxied transmission based on the first discovery frame and appends additional information, wherein the additional information includes an indication that the one or more attributes are associated with the origin STA and that the one or more attributes are being transmitted by proxy transmission, and wherein the additional information includes address information for the origin STA; and transmit, to one or more other STAs, the second discovery frame. The STA of claim 1, wherein the second discovery frame includes one or more attributes associated with a different origin STA and address information of the different origin STA associated with the one or more attributes. The STA of claim 1, wherein the second discovery frame includes one or more different origin STAs, associated address information for each of the one or more different origin STAs, and one or more indices each associated with a respective one of the one or more different origin STAs. The STA of claim 1, wherein the second discovery frame has a unique service identifier that is used to identify the second discovery frame as having proxied attributes. The STA of claim 1, wherein the second discovery frame includes an attribute that stores the additional information including the indication that the one or more attributes are associated with the origin STA and the address information for the origin STA. The STA of claim 1, wherein the processor is further configured to repeatedly transmit, to the one or more STAs, the second discovery frame. The STA of claim 1, wherein an attribute in the one or more attributes is associated with a service that the origin STA offers to the one or more other STAs or a service that the origin STA seeks from the one or more other STAs. A station (STA) in a wireless network, the STA comprising: memory; and a processor coupled to the memory, the processor configured to: receive, from a proxy STA, a first discovery frame that includes one or more attributes and additional information, wherein the additional information includes an indication that the one or more attributes are associated with an origin STA and that the one or more attributes are being transmitted by proxy transmission, and wherein the additional information includes address information for the origin STA; and obtain, from the additional information, the address information of the origin STA and the one or more attributes associated with the origin STA based on the first discovery frame; and transmit, to the origin STA, a second frame using the address information. The STA of claim 8, wherein the first discovery frame includes one or more attributes associated with a different origin STA and address information of the different origin STA associated with the one or more attributes. The STA of claim 8, wherein the additional information includes one or more different origin STAs, associated address information for each of the one or more different origin STAs, and one or more indices each associated with a respective one of the one or more different origin STAs. The STA of claim 8, wherein the first discovery frame has a unique service identifier that is used to identify the first discovery frame as having additional information. The STA of claim 8, wherein the first discovery frame includes an attribute that stores the additional information including the indication that the one or more attributes are associated with the origin STA and the address information for the origin STA. The STA of claim 8, wherein an attribute in the one or more attributes is associated with a service that the origin STA offers to the one or more other STAs or a service that the origin STA seeks from the one or more other STAs. A computer-implemented method for communicating by a station (STA) in a wireless network, comprising: receiving, from an origin STA, a first discovery frame that includes one or more attributes intended for proxied transmission; generating a second discovery frame that includes the one or more attributes intended for proxied transmission based on the first discovery frame and appends additional information, wherein the additional information includes an indication that the one or more attributes are associated with the origin STA and that the one or more attributes are being transmitted by proxy transmission, and wherein the additional information includes address information for the origin STA; and transmitting, to one or more other STAs, the second discovery frame. The computer-implemented method of claim 14, wherein the second discovery frame includes one or more attributes associated with a different origin STA and address information of the different origin STA associated with the one or more attributes.
